events.content: Implemented structured agent results as a broker-mediated callback token plus MCP tool

raw.question: Implemented structured agent results as a broker-mediated callback token plus MCP tool
raw.chosen: Implemented structured agent results as a broker-mediated callback token plus MCP tool
raw.reasoning: The SDK can declare a result contract at spawn time, the broker mints a per-agent callback token, and the injected Relaycast MCP server exposes submit_result without requiring the spawned agent to know broker credentials.

retrospective.summary: Added structured spawned-agent result contracts across the broker, MCP tool, and TypeScript SDK, with focused Rust and Vitest coverage plus docs.
